strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak: founded GISCollective, built open-source tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and led community workshops and talks
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) shows active engagement with the AI platform space
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; education is a BS in CS and a fine arts bachelor's, with no evidence of formal ML/AI study
AI expertise is nascent — substantive AI work only appears from April 2025 onward, far short of the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products' the role expects
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff individual contributor with no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership at the scale this role requires

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a well-rounded, technically curious engineer with a long track record of shipping across diverse stacks and a genuine entrepreneurial thread, but the role demands a director-level principal with recognized, years-deep AI expertise and a history of advising strategic partners — a profile this candidate does not yet match. His AI work is real but very recent (2025), his formal credentials lack the preferred graduate-level AI background, and nothing in the resume suggests the cross-organizational influence or strategic advisory scope the position requires.
